## 1.Easy_RSA-TAMUctf

file.txt

```
Hey, you're a hacker, right? I think I am too, look at what I made!

-----------


(2531257, 43)
My super secret message: 906851 991083 1780304 2380434 438490 356019 921472 822283 817856 556932 2102538 2501908 2211404 991083 1562919 38268

-----------

Problem is, I don't remember how to decrypt it... could you help me out? 
```

应该是给了n和e，且n比较小，可以分解，得到p=509 q=4973，然后算出phi，求d，所以可以算出m

```
m=c^d mod n
```

```
获得d m
58739
[103, 105103, 101109, 12383, 97118, 97103, 10195, 83105, 12095, 70108, 121105, 110103, 9584, 105103, 101114, 115125]
```

结果发现解密时只有第一个解得出，所以试试分开

```
[103, 105，103, 101，109, 123，83, 97，118, 97，103, 101，95, 83，105, 120，95, 70，108, 121，105, 110，103, 95，84, 105，103, 101，114, 115，125]
```

最后解码得gigem{Savage_Six_Flying_Tigers}

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import *
n=2531257
e=43
p=509
q=4973
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=gmpy2.invert(e,phi)
print(d)
m_list=[]
list=[906851, 991083, 1780304 ,2380434, 438490 ,356019 ,921472 ,822283 ,817856 ,556932 ,2102538 ,2501908 ,2211404 ,991083 ,1562919,38268]
for i in list:
    m=pow(i,d,n)
    m_int=int(m)
    m_list.append(m_int)
print(m_list)
m_list2=[103,105,103,101,109,123,83,97,118,97,103,101,95,83,105,120,95,70,108,121,105,110,103,95,84,105,103,101,114,115,125]
m_sum=[]
for i in m_list2:
    m_i=chr(i)
    m_sum.append(m_i)
flag=''.join(m_sum)
print(flag)
```

## 2.Easy RSA-NCTF

题目描述：

```
nctf{}
```

rsa.py

```
n = 
p - q = 
e = 65537
c = 
```

关键：已知n和p-q

```
有p*q=n p-q=x
求解一元二次方程获得q和p
```

求解：

```
(p+q)^2=(p-q)^2+4*p*q
得到:(p+q)^2=x^2+4n
两式相加得到:p,q
```

参考代码：

```
import gmpy2
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import *

def su(n, de):
    jia = de * de + 4 * n
    s = math.isqrt(jia)
    if s * s != jia:
        raise ValueError("不合法")

    p = (s+de)//2
    q = (s-de)//2

    return p, q

if __name__ == "__main__":
    n = 
    p_de_q = 
    p, q = su(n, p_de_q)
    print("p=",p)
    print("q=",q)
```

得到

```
p= 
q= 
```

最后求解得d，解码c

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import *
p= 
q= 
n = 
e = 65537
c = 
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
m=pow(c,d,n)
flag=long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

获得nctf{my_M4th_1s_t00_b4d!!!}
